# Three.js Builder External Reference

Source repository: https://github.com/chongdashu/threejs-toonshooter

Downloaded from:
- `.claude/skills/threejs-builder/SKILL.md`
- `.claude/skills/threejs-builder/references/`
- `.claude/skills/threejs-builder/scripts/`

Use these files as reference material for Sahib AI 3D implementation patterns only. Do not copy desktop-only gameplay, browser DOM UI, keyboard/mouse controls, dash/grenade/sudden-death mechanics, or hosting setup into the V1 mobile quick-round scope.

Project mobile rules: `docs/THREEJS_MOBILE_RULES.md`
